title: G-mail Account Disconnecting All the Time - Emails not working on boards for a user
excerpt:
Hello, 
One of my users is constantly disconnected or/and the emails automatisations just do not work for him. We reconnect him, they work for the next client that arrives on his boards and then the clients after him - n…

posts.author: hbsfrance (Pierre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
One of my users is constantly disconnected or/and the emails automatisations just do not work for him. We reconnect him, they work for the next client that arrives on his boards and then the clients after him - no results. I checked the admin on gmail, I whitelisted the IPs, I recreated at least two times all the automatisations and the email integrations for him from A-Z by deleting the email, reconnecting it, connecting it, etc, nothing works fine.

Screenshot 2021-09-07 at 10.45.431920×968 83 KB

Screenshot 2021-09-07 at 10.45.28704×622 121 KB

Screenshot 2021-09-07 at 10.45.481920×957 76.6 KB

posts.author: MWPC (Michael Owen)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a similar issue with automation not working for every user. did you find the fix or a solution ?

posts.author: hbsfrance (Pierre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,
I just had a long battle loging in and off google, clicking on the security of google, remaking all of the automations one by one and eventually it worked.
